step_rationale: CAD-associated variant; endothelial cell marker implicated in MI susceptibility via endothelial dysfunction.
mechanism: FLT1 dysfunction impairs endothelial homeostasis and is associated with coronary artery disease and myocardial infarction risk.

references.title: Plasma Proteome Analysis Identifies Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor Receptor 1 as a Prognostic Biomarker in Cardiogenic Shock.
Association of six genetic variants with myocardial infarction.
Association between sympathoadrenal activation, fibrinolysis, and endothelial damage in septic patients: a prospective study.
A genome-wide association study of a coronary artery disease risk variant.
Regeneration of ischemic cardiac muscle and vascular endothelium by adult stem cells.
